title: Silky Fresh Kenyan Crustaceans Stir-fry
description: A fresh and silky weeknight dish featuring crustaceans in a flavorful Thai-inspired sauce with whole30-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lime
ingredients.notes: lemon or lime can be used interchangeably, optional

ingredients.name: 3 tbsp coconut aminos (soy sauce)
ingredients.notes: can use tamari for gluten-free option

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp fish sauce (optional, can omit for no seafood flavor)
1/4 cup water
ingredients.notes: adjust to thin out the sauce if needed

instructions: Heat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onion and garlic, sauté for about 2 minutes until softened.
Add the crab meat to the pan. Stir-fry for another minute.
Deglaze the pan with lime juice (or lemon), scraping up any bits from the bottom of the pan.
Pour in coconut aminos, fish sauce (if using), and water. Bring to a simmer.
Stir everything together until heated through and the sauce has thickened slightly.
Serve immediately over steamed jasmine rice.
